rows.Product: Motor City Pizza Co. 5 Cheese Bread — Single Pack (UPC 8 70375 00511 1) and 2 Pack (UPC 8 70375 00509 8). Sell-by dates Feb-Apr 2027.
rows.Reason: Possible Salmonella contamination — precautionary recall following upstream California Dairies, Inc. milk powder recall. Milk powder was supplied to a third-party manufacturer producing a seasoning blend used in the 5-cheese sauce. Routine testing of the seasoning batches tested negative for Salmonella; recall conducted out of abundance of caution.
rows.Notes: Company announcement 2026-05-29; FDA publish 2026-06-01. Nationwide US distribution via Costco, Walmart, Kroger, Target, Publix, Meijer, Giant, Schnucks, Grocery Outlet, C&S, Bozzuto's, Brookshire Grocery, Food City, KeHe, Lipari, Merchants Dis Hickory, PDI/Hy-Vee, River Valley, SpartanNash, Supervalu, UNFI, Jewel. No illnesses reported. rows.Product: Aronurish Growing Up Formula Powder — 750 g cans, manufacture date 2025-04-23, best-before 2027-04-22. Place of origin: Inner Mongolia. Imported into Hong Kong; 220 boxes (1,320 cans) imported; ~488 cans sealed/marked. Retail distribution via Mannings.
rows.Reason: CFS Food Surveillance Programme sample collected at retail tested positive for the heat-stable toxin Cereulide produced by Bacillus cereus. Importer and retailer instructed to stop sales and initiate precautionary recall.
rows.Notes:
